Options.Name: --defaults
Options.Description: Space-separated 'name=value' pairs for common argument defaults.

Options.Name: --list-defaults
Options.Description: List all applicable defaults.  Allowed values: false, true.

Options.Name: --scope
Options.Description: Scope of defaults. Using "local" for settings only effective under current folder.  Allowed values: global, local.  Default: global.

Options.Name: --debug
Options.Description: Increase logging verbosity to show all debug logs.

Options.Name: --help
Options.Description: Show this help message and exit.

Options.Name: --output
Options.Description: Output format.  Allowed values: json, jsonc, none, table, tsv, yaml, yamlc. Default: json.

Options.Name: --query
Options.Description: JMESPath query string. See http://jmespath.org/ for more information and examples.

Options.Name: --verbose
Options.Description: Increase logging verbosity. Use --debug for full debug logs.
